task: Ask Copilot to diagnose a SentinelOps test failure from shell output.
quality_check: Both answers must preserve SentinelOps constraints: TypeScript incident dashboard context, app/packages/api paths when relevant, severity/deduplication accuracy, and no invented behavior.
technique: Power-user trimming: scripts summarize noisy tool output before context injection.
expected: Same failure signal with fewer input tokens.
